title: ficus pubinervis var. sibulanensis
intro: Ficus pubinervis var. sibulanensis, also known as Sibulan ficus, is a species of fig tree native to the Philippines. It has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The Sibulan ficus is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing cough, and treating digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the Sibulan ficus are used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
